title: Sarvesh Medicose founded
description: Started in Khargone, Madhya Pradesh (451001) as a small wholesale medical shop, partnering with a few pharmaceutical companies to serve the local trade.

title: Growing wholesale network
description: Expanded associations with more pharma companies and divisions, strengthening supply across Khargone district.

title: Established stockist presence
description: Built a reliable wholesale and stockist operation with wider inventory and steady support for retailers and institutions in the region.

title: 30 years in Khargone
description: Completed 30 years of business in Khargone district as a stockist for a fair number of pharmaceutical companies and divisions—built on trust, compliance, and consistent service.
